title: JWTClaims
description: Standard JWT payload claims for any backend authentication system (Skill 10 - jwt-authentication)

sub.description: Subject — the user's identifier field (email, username, phone, etc.)

id.description: The user's database ID for fast lookup without additional queries

roles.description: List of role names the user has — used by the authorization layer (skill 11)

iat.description: Issued At — Unix timestamp (seconds) when the token was created

exp.description: Expiration — Unix timestamp (seconds) when the token expires. Reject if current time > exp.
